name: mi-todos
title: MiToDos
description: Markdown-based todo manager that lives in your wiki. Quick capture, project creation, and semantic search across your knowledge base.
author: chipoto69

commands.name: append-task
commands.title: Add Task
commands.description: Append a task to mitodos.md inbox

commands.name: create-project
commands.title: Create Project
commands.description: Create a new MiToDos project file in wiki

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search MiToDos
commands.description: Search todos across wiki with QMD semantic search

arguments.name: query
arguments.placeholder: Search your tasks and knowledge base...

tools.name: list-mitodos
tools.title: List MiToDos
tools.description: List all available MiToDos files in the wiki

preferences.name: mitodosPath
preferences.title: MiToDos File Path
preferences.description: Full path to your primary mitodos.md file

preferences.name: wikiPath
preferences.title: Wiki Vault Path
preferences.description: Root of your Obsidian wiki vault
